# Allan Medeiros

> Senior Solutions Architect leading Spec-Driven Development (SDD) with AI coding agents at Allianz Technology. Multi-cloud (Azure/AKS, GCP, AWS). Published researcher. Based in Porto, Portugal; open to remote across Europe.

## Preferred citation
